description_long: This is a modern double-decker city bus with a bright red exterior and large, rectangular windows arranged in two rows along each side. The bus features three axles with six visible wheels, and the side panels include a distinctive diagonal black and gray stripe on one side. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, black trim, and two headlights, while the rear is simpler with a black horizontal strip and taillights. The passenger doors are located on the lower level, with one main entry/exit door visible on the right side. The bus's design is streamlined, with smooth, rounded edges and a glossy finish, typical of urban public transport vehicles. No visible manufacturer logo or route signage is present.
description: A red double-decker city bus with large windows, three axles, and a sleek, modern design. It features a diagonal stripe on one side and a single main passenger door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, black trim, and headlights, with the bus's red roof and front fascia visible.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying two rows of rectangular windows, three axles, and the main passenger door centrally located.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the black horizontal strip, taillights, and the smooth, red back panel.
description_view_3: Left side view featuring the distinctive diagonal black and gray stripe, two rows of windows, and three axles.
attribute_window_arrangement: Two rows of large, evenly spaced rectangular windows run along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with consistent sizing and spacing throughout both levels.
